title: Enendru Solvadho Lyrics Om Shanthi Om Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Enendru Solvadho Lyrics Om Shanthi Om
Singer(s): Harish Raghavendra, Swetha Mohan
Lyrics: Na Muthukumar

Ennendru Solvadho
yaedhendru sollvadho
unn kannai kandaal
enakullae poraattam.

Envazhavil ippadi
thadumaattram eppadi
en varththai thaeindhu
oru mounam thee moottum.

Vizhi paarvai odi vandhu
bodhai aettruthadi
paadhai maattruthadi ennai

Vidi kaalai vandhavudan
imaigal thirandhavudan
kenji kettkudhadi unnai, unnai.

Idhuthaanaa idhuthaana
kadhal idhuthanaa
inbam thunbam serndhaal
kadhal adhuthaanaa.
Ennendru Solvadho ...

Idhupola eppozhudhum aandhillai
kaalgal thallaadi ponadhillai
parandhaen midhandhaen,vinnmelae

Edhirpaarthu eppodhum nindradhillai
idhayam enpechai kettkavillai
thaviththaen thudiththaen, unnaale.

Udai maara, nadai maara
naan pudhidhaai pirandhaney.

Sila neram unai ennai
naan ennai marandhaeney.
indha maayam ellaam
pennae edhanaale.

Idhuthaanaa idhuthaana
kadhal idhuthanaa
inbam thunbam serndhaal
kadhal adhuthaanaa.
Ennendru Solvadho ...

Thaniyaaga naanpesi nindradhillai
thaedi thindaadi thozhaindhadhillai
edhanaal edhanaal idhu yeno.

pala nimidam yosiththum puriyavillai
thookkam tholaidhooram ponadhillai
edhanaal edhanaal idhu yeno.

Nadhimelae ilai polae naan
unnaal alaindhaeney.
nagarndhaalum nagaraamal
naan unnaal uraindhaeney.

ada kadhal vandhaal
dhinamum thirunaazhey.

Ennendru Solvadho
yaedhendru sollvadho
unn kannai kandaal
enakullae poraattam.

Envazhavil ippadi
thadumaattram eppadi
en varththai thaeindhu
oru mounam thee moottum.

Vizhi paarvai odi vandhu
bodhai aettruthadi
paadhai maattruthadi ennai

Vidi kaalai vandhavudan
imaigal thirandhavudan
kenji kettkudhadi unnai, unnai.

Idhuthaanaa idhuthaana
kadhal idhuthanaa
inbam thunbam serndhaal
kadhal adhuthaanaa.
Ennendru Solvadho ...

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Enendru Solvadho?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the inner feelings of the characters in Om Shanthi Om.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

This song plays during a pivotal moment in Om Shanthi Om, highlighting the romantic connection between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Harish Ragavendra and Shweta Mohan.

Who composed the music for Enendru Solvadho?

The music for this song was composed by Vijay Ebenezer.

When was Enendru Solvadho released?

The song was released on November 8, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Enendru Solvadho, the characters express their innermost feelings of love and desire, making it a poignant moment in Om Shanthi Om. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing. It beautifully captures the essence of romantic relationships, making it relatable for anyone who has experienced love. The collaboration between the talented singers and the composer adds depth to the emotional narrative of the film.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Enendru Solvadho from Om Shanthi Om is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Harish Ragavendra and Shweta Mohan's enchanting vocals, this song takes you on an emotional journey. The heartfelt lyrics by Na Muthukumar, combined with Vijay Ebenezer's soulful composition, make it a must-listen for romantic souls.
stanzaMeanings: When you ask what I say, looking into your eyes, there is a struggle within me.
How can I change my life like this? My words have turned into a silent fire.
The gaze comes rushing in, awakening me, changing my path.
With the arrival of the dawn, the doors open, and I hear you, I hear you.
Is this love? Is this happiness? When joy and sorrow come together, is this love?
Just like this, every time, it doesn't stop, it doesn't fly away, I have fallen into the sky.
Always looking ahead, my heart never sleeps, I have not heard your call, I have stumbled, because of you.
I have changed my way, I have changed my path, I was born anew.
For a while, I forgot you, I forgot myself. All this magic, what is it for, girl?
Is this love? Is this happiness? When joy and sorrow come together, is this love?
I speak alone, it doesn't stop, I search, I don't know why this is happening.
For many moments, I think but don't understand, sleep has left me, I don't know why this is happening.
Like a river, I have flowed with you. Even in the city, I have connected with you.
When love comes, every day feels like a festival.
When you ask what I say, looking into your eyes, there is a struggle within me.
How can I change my life like this? My words have turned into a silent fire.
The gaze comes rushing in, awakening me, changing my path.
With the arrival of the dawn, the doors open, and I hear you, I hear you.
Is this love? Is this happiness? When joy and sorrow come together, is this love?
